I] के.वी.आर. मू琔त榁, संयु猴 सिचव MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd January, 2018 S.O. 351(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 1 of the Companies (Amendment) Act, 2017 (1 of 2018), the Central Government hereby appoints the 26th January, 2018 as the date on which the provisions of section 1 and section 4 of the said Act shall come into force. [F. No. 1 /1 /2018-CL.I] K.V.R. MURTY, Jt.
